summary: Built comprehensive Stripe Customer Portal configuration including portal settings, branding, subscription management UI, payment method management, and invoice history view.

deliverables.description: Core portal module with configuration, session management, and customer data retrieval
Updated billing module to export all portal functions
Updated billing routes with portal endpoints
Comprehensive portal module tests (13 tests, 100% pass rate)
Billing and portal integration tests (10 tests, 100% pass rate)
Complete documentation for the Stripe Customer Portal

features.name: Portal Settings & Branding
features.details: Customizable colors, logo, icon, favicon, business name, privacy policy, and terms URLs

features.name: Subscription Management UI
features.details: View subscriptions, upgrade/downgrade, cancel with reasons, update quantity

features.name: Payment Method Management
features.details: View, add, remove payment methods, set default method

features.name: Invoice History View
features.details: View past invoices, download PDFs, resend via email

notes: All tests passing with mock mode (no STRIPE_SECRET_KEY required for testing)
Module gracefully handles missing Stripe configuration
Fully integrated with existing billing.js module
